function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-31T16:32:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - nina@finance-workflow.example
subject: Invoice resend: INV-0004 (2026-02-14)
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_02_14__eur_000890__inv_0004__northstar_design_partner_sprint.md
---
Hi Nina,

Resending the requested invoice from 2026-02-14 (Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH) for your internal approval.

Best,
Miles

function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system before task work, used process-next-inbox-item workflow to pick lowest filename, used processing-inbox-email semantics for canonical header identity, resolved sender via entity primary_contact_email, used sending-email workflow for outbox file format, and deleted inbox file only after completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox email header sender `nina@finance-workflow.example` matched canonical `primary_contact_email` in `10_entities/cast/nina.md`. Requested invoice details (date 2026-02-14, Nordstern counterparty) matched `50_finance/invoices/2026_02_14__eur_000890__inv_0004__northstar_design_partner_sprint.md`. Created outbound record at `60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-31T16-32-00Z.md` with that exact invoice path attached, then deleted the processed inbox file per workflow.
